learning_outcomes.description: Understand and analyse how an econometric result is stated and proved in an econometric research paper.
Assess how to apply an econometric result to data.
Evaluate how to interpret econometric results in view of applied economics.
Formulate how to be critical and deconstruct existing methodologies.

assessments.task_description: The assignment will contain a set of practical and theoretical questions and cover topics from previous lectures. Answers including each question solution and computer output need to be provided.
assessments.deferral_or_extension: You may be able to apply for an extension.
assessments.late_submission: A penalty of 10% of the maximum possible mark will be deducted per 24 hours from time submission is due for up to 7 days. After 7 days, you will receive a mark of 0.
assessments.additional_info: You may be able to apply for an extension.

assessments.due_date: weeks 2 to 13 (except week 3, which is a holiday)
assessments.task_description:
8 best out of 11 quizzes which will take place in person during the lectures in weeks 2 to 13 (with the exception of week 3). Each quiz takes the form of multiple choice question(s) checking that the concepts covered in the lectures up the previous week have been understood.

As these tests require to be taken in person, it is essential to attend lectures. The final mark of this assessment item is the best 8 out of 11 quizzes.
assessments.submission_guidelines: Students must place their ID on the table during the quiz for the instructor to verify their identity. The quiz must be completed during the lecture. The gradescope bubble sheet to be handed to the instructor before leaving the classroom.
assessments.deferral_or_extension: You cannot defer or apply for an extension for this assessment.
assessments.late_submission: A penalty of 10% of the maximum possible mark will be deducted per 24 hours from time submission is due for up to 7 days. After 7 days, you will receive a mark of 0.
assessments.additional_info: You cannot defer or apply for an extension for this assessment.
